title: A Busy Morning
story_html: Every morning, I wash my face. Then I eat breakfast with cheese. It is nutritious. I go to school with my sister. At school, we do a fun activity. We learn about a reptile today. A snake is one example. In art class, we make a paper bird. We glue on paper feathers. We enjoy cutting the paper shapes. After school, I do my homework at the table. By bedtime, I feel very tired.

tired.def: Needing rest; feeling low on energy.

wash my face.def: To clean your face with water.

cheese.def: A solid food made from milk.

activity.def: Something you do, especially for fun or learning.

feathers.def: The soft covering on a bird's body.

nutritious.def: Full of things that are good for your body.

homework.def: School work that students do at home.

glue.def: A sticky liquid used to join things together.

go to school.def: To travel to school for lessons.

reptile.def: An animal with scales that is usually cold-blooded.

cutting.def: Using scissors to cut paper or other material.

questions.qtext: "Then I eat breakfast with cheese. It is nutritious." What does nutritious mean?
options: full of things that are good for your body
questions.explain: Nutritious means full of things that are good for your body.

questions.qtext: "We learn about a reptile today." What is a reptile?
options: an animal with scales that is usually cold-blooded
questions.explain: A reptile is an animal with scales that is usually cold-blooded, like a snake.

questions.qtext: What does the narrator do first in the morning?
questions.explain: The story begins, "Every morning, I wash my face."

questions.qtext: What do they use to make the paper bird's feathers stick on?
questions.explain: The story says, "We glue on paper feathers."

questions.qtext: How does the narrator feel by bedtime?
questions.explain: The last sentence says, "By bedtime, I feel very tired."
